message:
feat(lax,core,ad): add ReduceAnd, ReduceOr, ReduceXor bitwise reduction primitives

Implement bitwise/logical reduction operations across the full stack:

- fj-core: add ReduceAnd, ReduceOr, ReduceXor variants to Primitive enum
  with as_str() mappings for serialization

- fj-lax: implement eval_reduce_bitwise_axes() in reduction.rs — a
  dedicated axis-aware reducer that handles both Bool tensors (via
  logical &&/||/^) and I64 tensors (via bitwise &/|/^), with full
  support for partial axis reduction and scalar collapse. Wire the
  three new primitives into eval_primitive dispatch. Add comprehensive
  unit tests covering scalar reduction, axis-specific reduction on
  rank-2 tensors, and integer XOR folding.

- fj-ad: register zero-gradient VJP and JVP rules — bitwise reductions
  are non-differentiable, so tangents are structurally zero.

- fj-dispatch/batching: extend the batch_reduce arm to cover the three
  new reduction variants so vmap correctly adjusts reduction axes.

- fj-egraph: register ReduceAnd/Or/Xor alongside existing bitwise ops
  in the e-graph pattern recognizer.

- fj-conformance: update the fuzzer's sample_primitive to include the
  three new reductions (modulus bump from 12 to 15), unify the
  reduction parameter sampling into a single match arm, and extend
  primitive_arity to classify them as unary.

- artifacts: add e2e golden data and test oracle logs for bitwise
  reduction conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+{
+  "scenario": "e2e_bitwise_reductions_oracle",
+  "generated_at_unix": 1772576919,
+  "all_passed": true,
+  "cases": [
+    {
+      "test_name": "test_reduce_and_all_true",
+      "reduction": "reduce_and",
+      "input_dtype": "Bool",
+      "input_shape": [3],
+      "axis": null,
+      "expected": true,
+      "actual": true,
+      "pass": true
+    },
+    {
+      "test_name": "test_reduce_or_one_true",
+      "reduction": "reduce_or",
+      "input_dtype": "Bool",
+      "input_shape": [3],
+      "axis": null,
+      "expected": true,
+      "actual": true,
+      "pass": true
+    },
+    {
+      "test_name": "test_reduce_xor_integer",
+      "reduction": "reduce_xor",
+      "input_dtype": "I64",
+      "input_shape": [3],
+      "axis": null,
+      "expected": 0,
+      "actual": 0,
+      "pass": true
+    }
+  ]
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+[
+  {
+    "test_name": "test_reduce_and_all_true",
+    "reduction": "reduce_and",
+    "input_dtype": "Bool",
+    "input_shape": [3],
+    "axis": null,
+    "expected": true,
+    "actual": true,
+    "pass": true
+  },
+  {
+    "test_name": "test_reduce_or_one_true",
+    "reduction": "reduce_or",
+    "input_dtype": "Bool",
+    "input_shape": [3],
+    "axis": null,
+    "expected": true,
+    "actual": true,
+    "pass": true
+  },
+  {
+    "test_name": "test_reduce_xor_integer",
+    "reduction": "reduce_xor",
+    "input_dtype": "I64",
+    "input_shape": [3],
+    "axis": null,
+    "expected": 0,
+    "actual": 0,
+    "pass": true
+  }
+]

@@ -128,6 +128,9 @@ pub enum Primitive {
     ReduceMax,
     ReduceMin,
     ReduceProd,
+    ReduceAnd,
+    ReduceOr,
+    ReduceXor,
     // Shape manipulation
     Reshape,
     Slice,
@@ -237,6 +240,9 @@ impl Primitive {
             Self::ReduceMax => "reduce_max",
             Self::ReduceMin => "reduce_min",
             Self::ReduceProd => "reduce_prod",
+            Self::ReduceAnd => "reduce_and",
+            Self::ReduceOr => "reduce_or",
+            Self::ReduceXor => "reduce_xor",
             Self::Reshape => "reshape",
             Self::Slice => "slice",
             Self::DynamicSlice => "dynamic_slice",

@@ -406,7 +406,10 @@ pub fn apply_batch_rule(
         Primitive::ReduceSum
         | Primitive::ReduceMax
         | Primitive::ReduceMin
-        | Primitive::ReduceProd => batch_reduce(primitive, inputs, params),
+        | Primitive::ReduceProd
+        | Primitive::ReduceAnd
+        | Primitive::ReduceOr
+        | Primitive::ReduceXor => batch_reduce(primitive, inputs, params),
 
         // ── Dot product ────────────────────────────────────────
         Primitive::Dot => batch_dot(inputs, params),

@@ -335,6 +335,9 @@ pub fn jaxpr_to_egraph(jaxpr: &Jaxpr) -> (RecExpr<FjLang>, BTreeMap<VarId, Id>)
             | Primitive::BitwiseAnd
             | Primitive::BitwiseOr
             | Primitive::BitwiseXor
+            | Primitive::ReduceAnd
+            | Primitive::ReduceOr
+            | Primitive::ReduceXor
             | Primitive::BitwiseNot
             | Primitive::ShiftLeft
             | Primitive::ShiftRightArithmetic
